results.title: Civil Lines police arrest woman for killing grandmother for gold jewellery
results.description: RAWALPINDI - The mystery of the blind murder of a 75-year-old woman was solved here on Friday when Civil Lines police arrested a woman, granddaughter of the deceased, and her husband for committing the murder to obtain the deceased’s gold jewelery.

results.title: America’s Debt Just Hit a WWII-Era Record While the Economy Booms: The Trap Nobody’s Talking About
results.description: The U.S. economy is growing at a healthy clip, yet the country is running deficits that history only associates with wartime emergencies. What that combination means for the next recession is a question nobody in Washington seems eager to answer.

results.title: Prince Harry and Meghan Markle’s Kids Reunite With King Charles
results.description: Reuters Prince Harry and Meghan Markle brought their two children to England to reunite with King Charles III after four years apart. Harry, 41, and Meghan, 44, brought seven-year-old Archie and five-year-old Lilibet to see their grandfather, according to Page Six , after previously nixing plans over concerns about the security of their visit. Read more at The Daily Beast.
